captures.framework: AWS Console sign-in (server-rendered IAM login form)

notes: Amazon Q lives inside the authenticated AWS Console. https://console.aws.amazon.com redirected to us-east-2.signin.aws.amazon.com/oauth (client_id=arn:aws:signin:::console/canvas, OAuth code_challenge flow). IAM user sign-in form shown (Account ID, IAM username, Password). No logged-in AWS session present; per instructions did NOT log in. Amazon Q chat transport unreachable in anonymous scope. etap-bypassed clean baseline.
